Name: Casimir from Metohja

Awareness.name: The Forbidden Delight
Awareness.description: Acquired a taste for human flesh, sensing its presence, getting intoxicated by its taste, gaining insights on your prey.

Heritage.name: Find the Path lost to Mankind
Heritage.description: Paths open for you in the wild.

Heritage.name: Surrender to the Dreamlord
Heritage.description: You always found that dreaming (and daydreaming) in the wild offers visions and warning for the future.

Traits.name: Lycanthropy?
Traits.description: After your dream in the Princesses’ hovel (see Notes§2), you suspect that you have been infected by Milutin and have until the full moon to fall under his complete control.

Traits.name: Severed nerves on left wrist
Traits.description: You suspect that because of lycanthropy, this wound has completely healed. If you are cured of lycanthorpy, the wound might return and rending you one-handed.

Traits.name: Torn right heel ligament
Traits.description: You suspect that because of lycanthropy, this wound has completely healed. If you are cured of lycanthorpy, the wound might return and temporarily crippling you.

Traits.name: Fractured left kneecap and damaged ligament
Traits.description: You suspect that because of lycanthropy, this wound has completely healed. If you are cured of lycanthorpy, the wound might return and permanently crippling you.

Gear: Leather trousers, shirt, boots, gloves & cap (DR:1 against crush and slash)
